title: callicarpa angustifolia
intro: Callicarpa angustifolia, also known as the purple plumier or slender purple fruit, is a flowering plant species in the family Lamiaceae. Traditionally, the plant is used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Callicarpa angustifolia are said to include relief from fever, pain, and respiratory issues, as well as antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm the efficacy and safety of these uses.
